description: Bring the Rust treb verify command to full flag parity with the Go CLI by adding verifier short flags, namespace/network scoping, contract path override, debug output, and blockscout URL alias

userStories.title: Add Short Flags for Verifier Selection and Blockscout URL Alias
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want -e, -b, -s short flags for --etherscan, --blockscout, --sourcify and a --blockscout-verifier-url alias for --verifier-url so that verify commands match Go CLI flag conventions
acceptanceCriteria: treb verify Counter -e parses and selects etherscan verifier
treb verify Counter -b parses and selects blockscout verifier
treb verify Counter -s parses and selects sourcify verifier
treb verify Counter -ebs parses and selects all three verifiers
treb verify Counter --blockscout-verifier-url https://example.com/api parses and populates verifier_url
parse_cli_from(...) unit tests in main.rs pin all short flag and alias parsing
Short flags and --blockscout-verifier-url alias are mirrored in build.rs build_verify()
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets passes

userStories.title: Add --namespace and --network Scoping Flags
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want --namespace and --network / -n flags on the verify command so that I can scope verification to specific namespaces or networks using the Phase 6 scoped resolution pattern
acceptanceCriteria: treb verify Counter --namespace staging resolves only within staging namespace
treb verify Counter -n mainnet resolves only within mainnet network
treb verify --all --namespace staging only verifies deployments in staging namespace
Interactive selection (no deployment arg) shows only filtered deployments when scope flags are provided
Scoped resolution error messages include context suffix (e.g. in namespace 'staging')
VerifyScope struct implements as_deployment_filters(), context_suffix(), no_deployments_message(), decorate_resolution_error()
parse_cli_from(...) unit tests pin --namespace and -n parsing
Flags are mirrored in build.rs build_verify()
cargo check --workspace passes

userStories.title: Add --contract-path Flag and Thread Through Verification
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want a --contract-path flag so that I can manually specify the contract source path (e.g. ./src/Counter.sol:Counter) to override artifact-based path resolution during verification
acceptanceCriteria: treb verify CounterProxy --contract-path ./src/Counter.sol:Counter uses the provided path instead of artifact-derived path
--contract-path value is split on colon: left side becomes ContractInfo.path, right side becomes ContractInfo.name
If --contract-path contains no colon, the entire value is used as path and the deployment contract_name is used as name
contract_path field added to VerifyOpts and threaded through both single and batch verify paths
Unit tests in treb-verify/src/lib.rs cover both --contract-path override and fallback to artifact path
--contract-path is mirrored in build.rs build_verify()
cargo check --workspace passes

userStories.title: Add --debug Flag for Forge Verify Command Output
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want a --debug flag on verify so that I can see the forge verify command arguments printed to stderr before execution for diagnostics
acceptanceCriteria: treb verify Counter --debug prints forge verify arguments to stderr before executing
Debug output appears for each verifier in both single and batch modes
Debug output does not appear when --debug is not specified
debug field added to VerifyOpts and threaded through verify execution path
parse_cli_from(...) unit test pins --debug parsing
--debug is mirrored in build.rs build_verify()
cargo check --workspace passes

userStories.title: Update Golden Tests, Help Snapshots, and Add Integration Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want updated golden snapshots and integration tests so that all new verify flags are covered by automated tests and help output is accurate
acceptanceCriteria: help_verify golden test passes and snapshots all new flags (-e, -b, -s, -n, --namespace, --network, --contract-path, --debug, --blockscout-verifier-url)
Root help golden snapshot refreshed if new flags appear in root help
Integration tests verify scoped resolution filters deployments correctly with seeded registry data
Integration tests verify short flags are accepted without error
UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 cargo test -p treb-cli --test integration_help refreshes all help snapshots cleanly
All existing golden tests pass with no unexpected regressions
cargo test --workspace --all-targets passes
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets passes
